nodes.label: New Email to CRM Contact
steps: Extract sender information from the email
Search for the contact in Hubspot CRM
If the contact exists, update the contact's information
If the contact does not exist, create a new contact in Hubspot CRM

nodes.label: Schedule Event and Send Email
nodes.trigger: User command via chat to schedule an event
steps: Parse event details (date, time, description) from user input
Send a confirmation email to the attendees via Gmail
